items.title: DCAuto
items.summary: Firmware CI fabric for MI450 data-center GPUs. Orchestrates deployments and validation across physical test systems, with idempotent self-check-in and fallback-recovery flows.

items.title: Sherlog Holmes
items.summary: Five-stage failure triage for 50,000-line GPU firmware logs. Embeddings plus FAISS search plus LLM root-cause analysis, shipped as Flask APIs and Celery workers over Azure Service Bus and MongoDB, with Teams alerts.

items.title: Qualcomm Software Center
items.summary: Electron app delivering drivers to global OEMs in Node, Angular, and TypeScript. Shipped the first macOS universal build (Intel and Apple Silicon); automated Jenkins and AWS CI/CD to cut release times by 50%.
